default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on blog content progress and address technical blockers for NBD's website.](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 articles ready; 5 uploaded, 15 more by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Blog section launch expected end of this week](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [404 errors occurring due to unpublished blog section](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Visuals received; more to be added for variety](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress

  - [20 articles prepared; 5 uploaded, 15 more by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [10 additional articles in progress for next week](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [40-50 new topics to be proposed next week](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Recommendation: Publish 5 articles daily over 4 days](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Technical Blockers

  - [Blog section not yet live on website](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [404 errors when accessing article URLs directly](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Both issues related; resolution expected by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Staging ready; green light given for live deployment](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Visual Assets

  - [Received via Google Drive link](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Currently have 30 images; more to be added weekly](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Positive feedback on quality and appearance](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Publishing Strategy

  - [Agreed to stagger article releases (5/day for 4 days)](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Aim to avoid bulk publishing of all 20 at once](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Next week to continue with batch of 10 articles](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to complete uploading 20 articles to backend by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Bea to confirm blog section goes live by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Team to resolve 404 errors once blog section is published](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Andrej to prepare 40-50 new topic ideas for next week](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [NBD team to continue adding visual assets to shared drive](https://fathom.video/share/MXpooDRpYhh4Wpx6D3ixxQm23ziN-xrb?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

action_items.description: Check w/ internal team re blog section launch timeline. Confirm w/ Andrej via Slack.
Inform dev team of 2 issues - 1) Need to surface blog section on site 2) 404 errors on direct blog links
